Document:
# DINGHY-CLASS SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1+
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] AME
[color=#a4885c]Expeditions:[/color] Yes
[color=#a4885c]IFF Console:[/color] None
[color=#a4885c]Available Roles:[/color] Contractor, Pilot, Mercenary
"The budget option, or the start of something greater. Basically a metal plate with a plastic dome, barely capable of planetary travel. Doesn't hold air very well. Includes some basic materials to begin constructing your own vessel*."
## Sidenotes
* - Dinghy-class ships are intended to be a versatile platform to build and test shuttle designs for experienced shuttle engineers.
